analysis.reasoning: Core message: The tweet quotes President Xi stating China will uphold multilateralism, engage in reforming global governance, and firmly support the UN-centered international system and international law. Evaluation by narrative: CH1 (West immoral/hostile): Not present; no mention or critique of the West or the US. CH2 (China is a benevolent power): Yes. The tweet portrays China as cooperative, pro-multilateralism, supportive of international law, and upholding a UN-centered order—hallmarks of the benevolent, rules-based, multilateral image. CH3 (Epic history): Not referenced. CH4 (Appropriate political system/values, domestic focus): Not applicable; message is about international role, not domestic system or governance values. CH5 (CCP government succeeds): No claims about domestic development or leadership success. CH6 (Culture/nature/heritage): Not relevant. Conclusion: The tweet promotes CH2.
